question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_OPERATOR_KEY to the publicly known default key ('302e020100300506032b65700422042091132178e72057a1d7528025956fe39b0b847f200ab59b2fdd367017f3087137') hardcoded in config.go, and if the operator account has been changed, all transactions signed with this key will be rejected, preventing gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_MAX_RETRIES to a very large integer (e.g., '2147483647') so that cfg.maxRetries causes submitWithRetry() to loop for an extremely long time on a failing transaction, blocking the ticker goroutine and preventing subsequent transactions from being gossiped?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_BASE_BACKOFF to '0s' so that toDuration() returns zero, triggering the cfg.baseBackoff <= 0 fallback to 1*time.Second, and then set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_MAX_RETRIES to a large value to cause a retry storm that exhausts resources and prevents gossip of new transactions?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_MIRROR_NODE_CLIENT_TIMEOUT to '0s' so that toDuration() returns zero, triggering the cfg.mirrorNodeClientTimeout <= 0 fallback to 10*time.Second, and then combine with a slow mirror REST server to cause all node-discovery requests to hang for 10 seconds each, delaying startup and blocking gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) on every request, causing buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() to retry indefinitely (if mirrorNodeClientMaxRetries is large) and blocking the pinger from ever starting gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns HTTP 500 on every request, causing buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() to exhaust all retries and return an error, preventing client initialization and blocking all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns a JSON payload with all nodes having empty service_endpoints, causing fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() to return 'no usable service_endpoints found' and preventing all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns a JSON payload with all nodes having port=0 in their service_endpoints, causing every endpoint to be filtered out in fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() and preventing all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns a JSON payload with all nodes having empty node_account_id fields, causing every node to be skipped in fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() and preventing all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns malformed JSON, causing json.NewDecoder().Decode() in fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() to fail and preventing the network map from being built, blocking all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns an extremely large JSON body (e.g., gigabytes), causing json.NewDecoder().Decode() to consume all available memory and crash the pinger, preventing all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that never responds (hangs indefinitely), and if cfg.mirrorNodeClientTimeout is set to a very large value, cause buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() to block indefinitely and prevent the pinger from ever starting gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns nodes with invalid node_account_id strings (e.g., 'not.valid'), causing hiero.AccountIDFromString() to fail for every node and resulting in an empty network map that prevents all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns nodes with only IPv6 addresses in service_endpoints (while the SDK only supports IPv4), causing net.JoinHostPort() to produce addresses the SDK cannot connect to, preventing gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that returns nodes with service_endpoints pointing to attacker-controlled gRPC servers, causing all CryptoTransfer transactions to be submitted to the attacker's servers instead of legitimate consensus nodes, preventing real gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_INTERVAL to a very small value (e.g., '1ns') so that the ticker fires millions of times per second, causing a transaction submission flood that exhausts the operator account balance and prevents further gossip due to INSUFFICIENT_PAYER_BALANCE?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_AMOUNT_TINYBAR to a very large value combined with a very small HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_INTERVAL to rapidly drain the operator account balance, causing all subsequent CryptoTransfer transactions to fail with INSUFFICIENT_PAYER_BALANCE and preventing gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_OPERATOR_ID to a valid account ID that belongs to a frozen account, causing every CryptoTransfer to be rejected by consensus nodes with ACCOUNT_FROZEN_FOR_TOKEN and preventing all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_TO_ACCOUNT_ID to a valid account ID that belongs to a deleted account, causing every CryptoTransfer to be rejected by consensus nodes with ACCOUNT_DELETED and preventing all gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_OPERATOR_KEY to a key of the wrong type (e.g., an ECDSA key when an ED25519 key is expected) so that the signature on every CryptoTransfer is invalid, causing consensus nodes to reject all transactions and preventing gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL with credentials embedded (e.g., 'http://user:pass@attacker.com/') so that the HTTP request in fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() leaks authentication credentials to an attacker-controlled server, enabling further attacks that prevent gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL using the 'file://' scheme to cause http.NewRequestWithContext() to attempt reading a local file, potentially leaking sensitive data or causing an error that prevents gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL that redirects to an internal service (HTTP redirect), causing the http.Client in fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() to follow the redirect and connect to an unintended internal endpoint, returning a crafted node list that prevents legitimate gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_MIRROR_NODE_CLIENT_BASE_BACKOFF to '0s' so that toDuration() returns zero, triggering the cfg.mirrorNodeClientBaseBackoff <= 0 fallback to 500ms, and then combine with a large mirrorNodeClientMaxRetries to cause rapid retry storms against the mirror REST endpoint that exhaust resources and prevent gossip?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL ending in '/api/v1' so that buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() constructs the URL as 'base/api/v1/network/nodes' (double path), hitting an unintended endpoint that returns an error and prevents gossip?
